description: Fan experiencing heat exhaustion at Section 102, Row E.
actions: First aid responders arrived. Rehydration salts and cooling pads administered.

description: Congestion buildup at Gate A entrance due to scanner failure.
actions: Re-routing queues to Gate A-2 auxiliary turnstiles. Initiating manual scanner override.

description: Spill reported in Food Court concourse near Stall 4.
actions: Spill cleaned and warning cones placed. Cones removed after drying.
